summary:
PROPHETIC FULFILLMENTS AND EARTHQUAKE OBSERVATIONS: Brandon highlights a recent 5.4 magnitude earthquake near Portland, Oregon, located in the ocean. He connects this seismic event to a previous vision he received concerning a tsunami wave that would strike this specific region, washing inland and causing widespread destruction. Brandon also mentions a book by Billye Brim titled The Authority of the Believer and How to Use It, emphasizing the importance of understanding spiritual authority and using scripture as a weapon against darkness during the Halloween season.

GOVERNMENTAL VISIONS AND POLITICAL EXPOSURES: Brandon details a critical 24-hour window concerning the United States government, mentioning JD Vance and the need for five to seven individuals to flip their political stance by October 31st. He describes seeing a fifteen million dollar slush fund directed toward Ukraine, which involves biological and chemical warfare laboratories. Brandon outlines the intense pressure placed on politicians by elites who threaten to withhold campaign funding for the 2026 elections, noting that AOC received four million dollars while Chuck Schumer received significantly less, causing political panic and theater.

THE HIT LIST AND RADICAL END-TIME VOICES: Brandon discusses information shared by Alex Jones regarding a million-dollar hit list that includes figures like General Flynn. Brandon recounts a divine message indicating that Alex Jones will experience a life-sparing event. This event will serve as a Road to Damascus experience, radically transforming Alex Jones into a John the Baptist figure for the last generation. Brandon notes that God will use unexpected, radical, and bold individuals, including Tucker Carlson, Mel Gibson, and Donald Trump, to speak unapologetic truths in the days ahead.

DIVINE FRIENDSHIP AND A MAJOR COMING EVENT: Brandon shares a profound conversation he had with God while driving, wherein God expressed a deep desire for genuine friendship and intimacy without personal agendas, comparing it to His relationship with Abraham. God warned Brandon that a massive shaking is approaching the earth, one that will make the COVID pandemic look minor. Brandon notes that just as the church was caught completely off guard by COVID due to a lack of intimacy with the Father, this upcoming event will heavily impact those who are distracted, while those who maintain close fellowship with God will receive prior warning.

HOLINESS REVERENCE AND TIMES SQUARE VISION: Brandon underscores the necessity of holiness, sharing an anecdote from Billy Burke about using a dedicated, holy pen exclusively for writing tithes, a practice Brandon and his wife Diana are adopting. He condemns the infiltration of secular practices and Halloween celebrations within the church. Furthermore, Brandon recounts a clear vision of Times Square on New Year's Eve during the countdown, while a John Lennon song plays. He describes witnessing a sudden, blinding flash of light and intense heat inside a building, causing mass panic, completely rejecting the notion that this event represents divine glory.

NATIONAL INTERCESSION AND SUPERNATURAL PROVISION: Brandon focuses on pleading the blood of Jesus over his family, the United States, and the government to thwart plots of mass rioting and anarchy, specifically calling for peace over Chicago, Boston, and New York. He describes a vision of the White House surrounded by green grass and a clear blue sky. Brandon warns against trusting the government or relying on federal jobs as a primary source of provision, declaring instead that God is the ultimate provider who will supernaturally supply needs. He prays for the removal of corrupt politicians and anticipates a significant political red wave.
rawData: [October 31, 2025]-[Praying over New York]-[https://youtu.be/XgmoyiWNuzA]-[Well, good evening family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me again tonight. We're going to pray and go over some things that we've seen in the news today to go along with what we're going to pray about. Braden has some articles and stuff he found. He likes to look at all the news and see what's going on in the day, what I'm seeing prophetically, and what goes with the news. He says, 'Dad, look at this. Yeah, look at this.' First off, I want to start with this. Did you all know that we had a 5.4 earthquake hit right outside of where I told you the earthquake would be by Portland, Oregon, and the ocean there? Can you show them a picture? We had that yesterday. The activity is ticking up again. I just think it's interesting because every single time it's right there. It's right where I saw it. That's where the tsunami wave comes in and goes clear inland, washing and destroying so much stuff. It's right there. I just thought, isn't that amazing? Again, we have it, and it's in the water. Then I want to show you this. I thought this was pretty cool. Diana found me this book. She paid $3 for it. I'm not trying to promote books, y'all; I just tell you things that I feel will help you, things that we're reading as a family. They are short little pocket reads because I like things that we can look over real quick. We're going over the authority of the believer during this Halloween time and all that's going on in this earth. Sister Billye Brim has a book, a little pocket read, $3 on her website. It's 'The Authority of the Believer and How to Use It.' I'd buy a whole bunch of them if we could to give to family or friends because you need to know how to use your authority. Sister Billye Brim sits in her seat of authority every single day, as do I, my wife, my son, and my daughters. We believe in the power and the authority of the believer. We'll read it together and go over some of this. We have a lot going on today, so I'm getting around late, but Diana is busy doing things for us. She's a hard worker. I told her, 'I want you to come on and go over some of this stuff about the authority of the believer, taking scriptures that apply to our protection and using them as a weapon against the devil.' It's the Word. You must know the Word in these last days, not just what somebody says. As much as I love her, it's the Word. It is a pillar and stands alone. Regardless of someone's opinion, you pray the opinion lines up with the Word, and this does. Finding scriptures that pertain to what you're believing for guides you. I wanted her to read some of it, but she's busy. I can do it, but I don't want to make her join. Real quick, I wanted to get this before everybody goes to bed. We have to pray over our government and what the Lord is showing me in the spirit. I want to show you one clip that a senator said today that is very alarming. This is what I'm telling you all we're dealing with when we're praying. Go ahead and play that short clip about this senator and what he said. Now I want to show you what JD Vance says. Vice President JD Vance said they're hoping for five people. When we were in the spirit Tuesday night, the Lord showed us it was by a thread. He said you're praying into it on Friday, and there were seven people whose hearts could change. He gave us the number. He says, 'We need five for the seven.' He said, 'If you give me this prayer time, if you just push through right now for the seven people that have this soft heart towards the Republicans trying to help people, if you push into that right now in the late midnight hour on October 31st, we could get this flipped.' Now, I told you I saw a major uprising, people rioting and pillaging. I've seen it all today as I've been driving around praying in the spirit over our nation. The Lord said I saw a 24-hour window. I saw in this window that this darkness would cause so much chaos and havoc in this nation that it would bring people to the table because they don't realize they're playing with fire. As I was praying into this, I saw 15 and I was looking at the zeros. I'm sorry, I'm terrible at math, but there's a $15 million slush fund in what I was praying over concerning our government with money going to Ukraine and pet projects. I saw it was the same kind of thing that was going on with Fauci and labs. I didn't realize that major chemical warfare labs are in Ukraine. That's where a lot of biological labs are. The Lord showed me evil governmental interests that they are trying to fund, pushing for certain things and slush funds. The Lord said, 'Do you see the evil behind this? This is what you're combating.' As you see these people, if they vote a certain way, they're getting pressure from these elites saying, 'We're not going to fund your campaign anymore. In 2026, if you don't do what we tell you, we're going to make sure you don't get reelected.' So, out of panic, like Schumer and all these other people, they start to freak out. He only had $174,000 donated to his campaign over the last month. AOC had over $4 million. AOC, the one who's nuts—$4 million was donated to her campaign and $170,000 to Schumer. So, he has to be the bulldog because he knows he's about to lose his job. It's all political games and theater. Then I thought another thing was interesting because Braden found that Alex Jones talked about the hit list. He even knew the order of the list and who was on it, saying some of the names were worth a million dollars a piece. He even said his own name was worth a million dollars. And then that one guy, Flynn, General Flynn, was worth a million bucks on that list. I didn't even see General Flynn's name on it. But he brought the list up on his show and Braden saw it and said, "Daddy, look, you're the list you're talking about, you're seeing in the spirit." Alex Jones knows about the list. And I even told you all as I was praying to it yesterday, I sit at the floor. I sit there and I talk to the Lord about when he said, "I will spare Alex Jones." And as his life is spared by an event, I want you to listen to this. He said, "An event will take place similar to Charlie Kirk's." And he said when this event happens, he would spare his life. Now why? I don't know. I don't question the father. I just hear what he says. But he said when this event takes place, he, Alex Jones, will become a type of a John the Baptist in this last generation. That he would be so radically changed by the hand of the Lord on his life. Even more so that this whatever this is, whatever we're praying against, praying for his safety, praying for these things that I saw a great shaking to awaken coming to the church, but concerning individuals, God said, I'm going to get their attention. I'm going to get their attention. Now, I don't know what that means. I'm going to get their attention. Whether it's a on the road to Damascus kind of an experience, you're riding your horse down the road or your car down the road and a light shines and they see and they go blind or whatever, I don't know. And the prophet prays for them and the power of God heals them. I don't know. But the Lord said, "I'm going to get their attention." And when this happens, they'll become a louder voice than most. Do you understand? A shaking to awaken. Now, am I prophesying doom and gloom on this man? I don't know him. I've been on his program twice. But I want to say this. The Lord said I'm going to use certain individuals who have a platform for me for my glory in the last days. So whatever that means, I don't know. I'm not trying to say there's a hit on his life. I don't know. I see in part. I hear in part. I want you to hear me. I see in part. I hear in part. But the Lord says, "I'm going to use Alex Jones greatly in the days ahead." That's what he said to me. Where's he at right now with the Lord? I have no idea. But the Lord said he would become like a John the Baptist in the days ahead with a loud voice. Is he corrupt now? I don't know. Is he a foul man? I don't know. But I know that God can do anything. God can take the hardest of hearts. God can take the people that you wouldn't even want to sit down socially and have a tea with and go, "You're going to use them?" Yeah. Okay. Well, who am I to say? All I do is say, "God, you are awesome and you can use anybody." But if he sees something in Alex, then that means we're to pray for him. Tucker Carlson. He's only brought him up once, but he specifically says he will become you. You know, somebody who has a backbone like a crowbar that is not afraid to say anything really socially. Somebody that has really no filter publicly behind a camera. There's no fear. And I look at that man as almost like a loose wire, like a loose cannon. You look at him and go, "What? You don't know what he's going to say." He's just bold as all get out when it comes to politics and things. And I really believe that's what it's going to take is people that are radical in these last days saying radical things for Jesus Christ. And if God can do that with maybe a Mel Gibson and he says, "I'm going to use Mel Gibson. I'm going to use these people. I'll use a Donald Trump. I'll use a man that's a businessman and make him into a politician and then make him into a radical Christian that is going to be something huge in these last days." And as he drops the f-bomb all the time on TV and you go, "I know what you said and what I've heard you say and what I've seen in visions doesn't line up so far yet but there's a road to Damascus experience." There's a road. There is a supernatural experience that all it takes is just a one moment with Jesus that will change you forever. No matter how dirty, how hard, how corrupt, how vile somebody may be. All it takes is one moment with Jesus and it'll change your life forever. So, who am I to ever say, "God, you said this. Well, how are you going to do that?" Who am I to ever say that? Because if he can use me, he can use them. I'm telling you, even with what I've dealt with, but he still uses me. He says, Brandon, come on, do a prayer video. Not that I'm vile, but I'm just trying to say I'm never going to put my life up to somebody else and say, "Well, I'm better." That's stupid. You know what I'm saying? There's so many people that try to do that kind of stuff. But as I was driving around today, this is where I'm going to now. That was yesterday. This is what I've been praying over. Praying over our government, praying over people that they'll use wisdom and not riot and steal and act crazy. I know what I've seen coming. I know I've seen a shaking coming. Can we stop it? The Lord's talking about a 24-hour window. I believe we will see them not pass this. I believe in the natural we won't see anything until Monday or whatever that there will be a window of craziness. That's just me. Now, the Lord said to me today as I was driving, he—the way our conversation went today—it's those precious talks and those precious moments that forever change you when you see that side of the Father in the spirit when you're praying. It's those precious moments when you see the such realness, you know, he lets that guard down as a father and just talks to you as a friend. And you're asking, "How are you today?" Well, he's God. Of course, he's good. You know what I'm saying? He's God. But you ask the questions that are personable. And like I said, when you get real with God, God becomes real to you, but it's bigger because of how he responded back. And he said, "Brandon, you know the my word says the eyes of the Lord are running to and fro throughout the whole earth looking for a heart who's perfect towards him. Looking for somebody so I can show myself strong in their behalf, right?" And he said, "The depth of that verse is I'm looking for a friend. And he says, I look upon the whole earth so that I could show myself strong in the behalf of those that have hearts that are perfect towards me. I'm looking for somebody, Brandon. But if you just dissect that, what I'm really looking for, I'm looking for a friend. And he said, "Abraham was a friend, Brandon. He was a friend to me. I could go and talk to him and we would talk about things and he was just a friend. And I'm looking right now. I'm looking throughout the whole world looking for just a friend. Are you a friend of God?" He said, "But there's so many of my children that they come to me all the time with all their projects, all their thoughts of what they want and it's not that we don't want to come to him, but how you do it and how you pursue him is not by material gain or by your request. Make your request known to God. But how you're a friend to him, how you seek him, how you find him, it was like a friend." It was like the way he was describing it to me. He said, "Brandon, my heart knows what you need before you even ask for it. I know everything that you ever need, son, but it's the heart that I'm looking at in you. I'm looking at in my children." He said, "I've already warned you that I'm not going to yell about the secret things concerning investments and concerning what's coming." He said, Abraham, I came and told him that Sodom and Gomorrah was going to be judged because he was my friend. And I don't do anything in the earth unless I reveal it to the prophetic voices first. But there is a place of intimacy that I will share everything with you just because you're my friend of what's coming. But I can see through the motive of the heart, the intent of the heart. Why are you doing this? Even before you think it. And he said, I'm looking for a friend. I'm looking for somebody to talk to. For the eyes of the Lord, he said, are running to and fro throughout the whole earth, looking for a heart who's perfect toward him, that just wants to be my friend. No agenda, no preconceived notions. You're God. If I ask God, you have everything. I just want to have an iced tea with you. I just want to talk with you and have a coffee. I miss you. How are you doing today? I know you're perfect and you don't lack anything. You don't want anything, but you want my heart and you want companionship. And you want a child that has no agenda. Daddy, can I have the keys to the car? Can I have what's in your bank account? Can we just go fishing? Can we just go out and sit by the river, the stream, the pond, the lake, whatever? I love to go by moving water and just sit by things for hours and look at the water, the ducks, the deer, whatever, and have that fellowship with you. As I was driving today out in the country and I was looking at the leaves starting to change here and the field was wet because we've gotten so much rain, you could see the water. As I was driving, I could feel the tug of the spirit of God of that friendship and that compassion that was wounded not by me but by the children that are just so blinded of his coming. It felt wounded. Not saying that he was wounded, but his heart was longing for a relationship and intimacy with his creation, with us. And he said, So many of my kids don't realize where we are. So many of my kids don't realize that they're the lot. And I will not yell. I'll come and fellowship with you and tell you what's coming. And he said, Brandon, I'll tell you and you can tell them because they don't talk to me. I'll share with you, son, and you can go tell them on that live stream what's about to take place. But they do exactly what they did to me all the time with the children of Israel. They sent Moses up the mountain. I wanted to fellowship with all of them. I said, Bring my children unto me that they may worship me. They come to the mountain, but they were afraid. And they sent Moses up. He said, Brandon, I'll allow you to go and tell the people what's coming. But because they are so busy with their lives, they are so distracted, they don't realize the seriousness of the hour and where we are in the signs of the times of the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. They don't realize there's a great shaking that's about to take place throughout the world that's going to wake everybody up. Their hearts are hard. Their hearts are far from me. He said, Many of their hearts are so hardened and so far from me. They're not a friend. They have an agenda every single time. Not just fellowship, not just intimacy. And I felt the heaviness of his heart as he said it. And he said, Even some correction towards me. And he says, As these things go, I've even seen you slip a little, but I'm asking you to correct it today. I said, I'm sorry. The pressure of things gets me and I lose myself with all of the pressure from the people and it's a distraction. Social media, TikTok, these people, the opinions of you're a racist and I'm not. He said, Brandon, if you are racist, do you think I'd have you where you are? Do you really think I'd let you talk to this many people like this? Bringing them to prayer is intimacy. Teaching them my heart is intimacy. This is the largest prayer channel in the world for what I see because I have eight other channels and they all pray just like this. He said, I want you to bring my people. I want you to teach them the intimacy. They can have it. I want them to have it. I'm looking for a friend. I said, Lord, even with all I have, I have not been a true friend some days. I'm sorry. I've not truly been a true friend and I do my best. My daughter, Paisley, came to me. She goes, Daddy, she was weeping in the back as he spoke because I was repeating everything he was saying and my family was weeping because the presence of the Lord filled our car because we could feel it. Could you feel it? It was intense. I want somebody else to say something. That's why I asked him. I know we could. I saw his face. He was crying, too. But it's not just me saying it for them. There was a presence in the car today that I've never been familiar with like that. A wounded presence. It felt heavy as we're going into a month right now, tomorrow. And I thought it was interesting because it was about Halloween. So many of the church, so many of his people celebrate the devil on that day and he looks at it as blasphemous. The intimacy was blasphemous. And it was like this. I heard he said, I want you to pay attention to what Billy Burke said at his service. Billy Burke says, I have a special pen just to write out my tithe check because it is holy and set apart. I take that pen and I don't use it for anything else other than to write my tithe or my offerings to God because it's separate and set apart. Everything I do, I try to make something separate and set apart for him. Even to an ink pen that's designated to write my tithe checks and my offering when I give it to a church or whatever God's instructing me to give, I won't write it by any other ink pen because it's holy. Boy, that challenged me. And then he said this. He said, There's so many of you all that want a move of God in your sanctuary, and you want God to visit there, but your sanctuary is not set apart and holy unto him at all. You play secular music. You've got Halloween decorations or Halloween harvest. You're playing, doing things, but you want the move of God in your church and you want him to visit a place. And he is a holy God that deserves to be reverenced and honored above everything else to the point that the Ark of the Covenant, if they touched it, they would die instantaneously because he's a holy God and you're only pure by his blood. Jesus Christ made you that way. But we have a place that we call a place of worship that he comes and this is set apart unto him. And yet we let the money changers, we let the whatever it's a place of not holiness. It's a place, yeah, we're set apart and we're templar there, but there's a place that's designated for him. It's a place that's set apart for him. I have a room in my house that's his. It's a main little corner right here. I pray I try to and there's actually portals that come as you pray in that place all the time. You intercede and you pray and you pray. I create thing by prayer interceding and even Perry Stone and these others talk about certain places in church you can feel the glory in those spots and you may think, Oh Brandon, that's way out there, I'm telling you try it, he'll meet you at that place. Now I talk to him all throughout the day but the last one is on the porch. You sit out on the porch in the rocking chair at the creek. It's a place that is yours and his alone. A closet wherever it says, "God, I love you and I just want to talk to you today." Your war room. But as I fellowshipped with him today and we talked and we drove around, I was challenged as he said, "It's time to come up higher; it's time to come up higher with the fire. It's time for more intimacy with the Father." He longs for a relationship with you more than you want one with him. I could feel it today as the people were getting ready to celebrate Halloween and have their trick-or-treat, trunk-or-treat, whatever they were doing. Most people did it on Sunday, but I'm trying to really bring it home to you that God is a holy God and he is worthy of all our praise. But he said to me, "A lot of you don't know what's about to take place." The shaking that's about to take place is to bring you close to him. He said, "But Brandon, I'll come and tell you to warn the people because I'm a passionate God, a God full of mercy. But if they don't draw nigh to me and they don't hear, I'm not going to yell what's coming." A shaking to awaken is coming, and many of you will be caught off guard; hopefully you have people interceding for you like Abraham interceded for Lot. You could be in the city and not even realize what's coming. When I was in the spirit and I prayed this last video, I saw a flash. I heard "Imagine" by John Lennon. People like, "Brandon, do you listen to secular music?" I wasn't talking about that; I was talking about a moment at New Year's Eve in Times Square. People get so off on weird stuff. I was like, "Come on, folks. It's a vision." I saw a flash of light and people were screaming. I saw the two men on CNN having their thing and then all of a sudden a flash of light. Women and men were screaming and they were trampling. I don't know what it was, but the Lord said, "Pray." I'm not going to add to or take away from anything I was seeing, but I'll tell you exactly: it was a flash of light and it was hot; I could feel the heat. I didn't say everything because I'm on live stream and I try to be very cautious until I pray over what I bring to you. But it was in a building; it wasn't out in the public. I saw into the side of a building, and as it was getting ready for the countdown of that thing to come down, I felt heat, I saw light, and it was blinding. And people said that was the glory. Come on now. As they're singing John Lennon, the glory showed up? I don't want to be disrespectful, but you guys have to let the elevator go to the top. As they're singing John Lennon and two homosexuals are on the stage counting the ball down, the glory showed up? I don't know about you, but maybe God will show up with his Shekinah glory in Times Square with these two men singing, drinking, and the Shekinah glory is going to show up. Is that what you all think is going to happen? You don't know him. I feel sorry for you; I truly do. There's no holiness, no reverence. Do you understand who he is? He's a holy God. That's why I'm scared to even pray without taking communion and looking over because the only way I know how to get close to him is by communion. It's because of a covenant that Jesus died for me and he rose again and he made a way for me. So I take communion every single time to reverence and honor him. I love the pen idea and I will never write a check again to my church or to anybody that the Lord tells me to give to without having a pen set apart for him. I'm taking the idea from Billy Burke. I told Diana, "You're going to get a really cool pen and it will only be for writing; you will never touch it again other than for Jesus." This will be a check-writing pen for Jesus. I loved it. We can put it in a sleeve and do something special with it. It doesn't have to be some high-dollar pen with diamonds on it; it's just something for Jesus. So we plead the blood and we take this body right now in the name of Jesus. Father, we thank you, Lord. No matter how much they try to attack us, how much witchcraft tries to come against us, or how much the devil tries to throw his curveballs at us, the greater one lives on the inside of us. We apply the blood of Jesus over our great nation tonight and over me and my wife and my children. We thank you, Father, for your relationship with us as we apply the blood of Jesus over us. Every tongue that rises against us, we condemn it. We believe in the precious blood of Jesus Christ and we lift it up before you, Father. We thank you, Father, for your grace and your mercy. We thank you, Lord, for the blood that covers every single one of us, for we enter in by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of our testimony. Thank you, Father, that you're a holy God and we find intimacy with you, and we thank you for our friendship with you, for we are a friend of God. Lord, we lift up the body and we thank you that you're so real to us, what you did for us. He cleansed us and made us whole. We take this body in Jesus' name. Lord, we plead the blood. My job is not to try to offend you; I'm just real with y'all. If you want intimacy, I try my best. I'm not saying I have everything perfect, but he does visit. The presence of the Lord does fill my house, so I feel like I'm on the right road. I may not always have it right, and I'm not out here trying to bust certain groups of people up. I'm not trying to be mean; I'm trying to tell you how to get intimacy with the Father is to repent and turn from your wicked ways. You must follow him; you must repent; you must humble yourself before a holy God. I just go with what the word says. You may not like me; you say, "Well, Brandon, you're too old school," but I just want Jesus. I don't try to browbeat anybody. He said, "Come just as you are," and people get mad and they click out and they leave. I'm just trying to help you, but I'm telling you, a great shaking is coming and many of you are in trouble. So Father, we take the blood and we apply the blood over us. We thank you, Father, for it's the blood that never loses its power. We plead the blood of Jesus Christ over our homes and over us in Jesus' name. We thank you, Father, that we make much of the blood and the blood makes much of us. We apply it tonight over the visions of what you want us to see and over what you want us to hear. We pray over our government and over what's coming. We thank you, Father, for the blood, for the grace, and for your mercy. We apply the blood all around our house tonight and over us, Father, and over any visions or anything you want to show us in Jesus' name. Amen. Hallelujah. Father, I thank you for the blood. Did that help you all at all? Where the Father's at? What he's saying? It shook me; the intimacy of the whole thing shook me. You could feel it because of where we are in these end times. He was talking about the shaking that's about to take place because they're not awake. He said, "I don't have a choice." People didn't hear—he said many of you did not hear about COVID before it came. Many of you... he said COVID came and they thought it was like a thief in the night, like most people. He said, "But I warned the ones that were intimate with me way in advance." He said, "But COVID, what's about to happen will make COVID look like a walk in the park. And many in the church don't see it because they think they're right with the Lord, but they're so far from me." He said, "They have a stiff neck toward me and they think they're right with me. They walk around and they play with the grace and they play with things, and none of them heard when COVID was coming." He said it shook. None of them knew that a major shaking was coming in 2018 or 2019, whenever all that was getting ready to happen. Everybody was caught off guard and we were all locked down in our houses. The preachers were all like, "Well, what are we going to do now? We're blowing on the virus. COVID, go!" What's wrong with everybody? That's what happened. We shut down the church, locked it up tight, and went home. "It's okay, it's safe there. Drive-by church, drive-by baptism. Line up as you drive by."
